title: Update Zephyr CoAP/SenML paths and constants to match spec
description: In lichen/subsys/lichen/coap and related Zephyr code, replace magic numbers for CoAP paths, Content-Formats (esp. 112 for SenML), ports (5683 etc.) with constants from headers or core. Align with spec/07-transport-app.md, appendix-senml.md.
